# FreeAgentStore

> FreeAgentStore is a free, open-source platform for browser-based AI tools. Three types: Libraries (pure TypeScript heuristics, npm-publishable), Models (ONNX via Transformers.js, runs on user's GPU), and Agents (use user's own API key via encrypted proxy). 49 agents across 10 categories. Every agent is MIT-licensed, privacy-first, zero tracking. For the full AI agent guide, see [SKILLS.md](https://freeagentstore.online/skills.md).

## AI Agent Integration

- [SKILLS.md](https://freeagentstore.online/skills.md): Complete platform guide for AI agents. Agent types, SDK reference, CLI commands, deploy flow, compliance rules, template scaffolding.
- [MCP Server](https://mcp.freeagentstore.online/mcp): Remote MCP server. 11 tools: list_agents, agent_info, deploy_status, create_agent, delete_agent, write_file, read_file, list_files, upload_to_r2, platform_guide, sdk_reference. Connect with `npx mcp-remote https://mcp.freeagentstore.online/mcp`.
- [Registry](https://freeagentstore.online/pkg/): ESM packages for all library agents. Import directly: `import { analyzeSentiment } from 'https://freeagentstore.online/pkg/sentiment/index.js'`.

## Agent Types

- **Libraries** (29): Pure TypeScript. Heuristic classifiers evolved by LLMs from data. Sentiment, emotion, language detection, date parsing, address parsing, name parsing, profanity filtering, intent/urgency/formality/topic/clickbait/sarcasm/question detection, code detection, JSON formatting, hashing, regex building, unit conversion, steering behaviors, behavior trees, physics simulation, name generation, icon search, avatar styling.
- **Models** (13): Transformers.js + heuristic post-processing. Food analysis, plant identification, semantic search, document scanning, receipt scanning, FAQ matching, plagiarism checking, meeting summarization, scene description, voice journaling. Models: MobileViT (20MB), MiniLM (23MB), Whisper Tiny (40MB), TrOCR (130MB), DETR (160MB).
- **Agents** (7): Chrome Built-in AI (Gemini Nano) or user's API key via platform proxy. Summarizer, writing assistant, code explainer, voice notes, mood palette, browser automation, document chatbot.

## Quick Start

```bash
# Use an agent via npm
npm install @freeagentstore/sentiment
import { analyzeSentiment } from '@freeagentstore/sentiment'

# Build your own
npx @freeagentstore/cli init my-agent --template heuristic
cd my-agent && npm run dev
npx @freeagentstore/cli publish
```

## Links

- Store: https://freeagentstore.online
- GitHub: https://github.com/FreeAgentStore (51 repos)
- Console: https://freeagentstore.online/console/
- API Keys: https://freeagentstore.online/v1/keys
- Pro tier: https://proagentstore.online
